calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2026 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. The court vacates the sanction previously imposed on the Plaintiff counsel on Oct-14-2025. At the request of Plaintiff's counsel, the court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2025 Continued To Feb-03-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to February 03,2026, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
